name: TypoGrammar Agent Skills
description: Discovery index of machine-readable skills and documentation exposed by TypoGrammar (https://typogrammar.com), a free English grammar and vocabulary learning hub.

skills.name: llms-overview
skills.description: Site-wide llms.txt overview describing TypoGrammar's structure, main sections, grammar topics, and canonical URLs for AI agents and LLMs.

skills.name: sitemap
skills.description: XML sitemap listing all crawlable URLs on TypoGrammar, including grammar topics, blog posts, IELTS/TOEFL prep pages, and reference materials.

skills.name: robots
skills.description: Crawler access policy and Content-Signal declarations (search=yes, ai-train=no, ai-input=no) for TypoGrammar.
